CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime64(3));
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (toDateTime64('1970-01-01 23:59:59.999', 3));
SELECT toTime(event_date) AS time_only FROM test_dates;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (toDateTime64('1970-12-10 01:20:30.3000', 3));
SELECT toTime(event_date) AS time_only FROM test_dates ORDER BY event_date;
CREATE TABLE events (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3));
SELECT e.id, toTime(e.event_time) AS time_only FROM events e WHERE e.id = 1;
SELECT id, toTime(event_time) FROM events WHERE toTime(event_time) BETWEEN '05:00:00' AND '06:00:00';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE toTime(event_time) = '12:45:30';
CREATE TABLE combined_events (id UInt32, event_date DateTime64(3), location String);
INSERT INTO combined_events VALUES (1, toDateTime64('1970-12-20 15:10:45.789', 3), 'New York'), (2, toDateTime64('1970-12-21 09:15:00.456', 3), 'Los Angeles');
SELECT ce.id, toTime(ce.event_date) AS time_only FROM combined_events ce WHERE ce.location = 'New York' ORDER BY ce.event_date DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toTime(event_date) AS time_only FROM combined_events) AS subquery WHERE time_only = '15:10:45';
SELECT toTime(toDateTime64('1970-06-01 12:00:00.999', 3)) AS result;
SELECT toTime(toDateTime64('1970-01-01 00:00:00.000', 3)) AS result;
SELECT toTime(toDateTime('2022-01-01 15:30:00')) AS result;
SELECT DISTINCT toTime(event_time) FROM events;
SELECT toTime(min(event_time)) AS min_time, toTime(max(event_time)) AS max_time FROM events;
INSERT INTO events VALUES (3, toDateTime64('1970-12-31 23:59:59.999', 3));
SELECT toTime(event_time) FROM events WHERE event_time > '1970-12-25';
